overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic neon-lit urban downtown. The player emerges from a covered walkway into bright sunlight, explores a plaza with a distinctive green parking structure, and continues along a busy city street with towering buildings, holographic advertisements, and passing vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with metal overhead trusses

events.description: exiting shadowed covered walkway into bright direct sunlight
moving from enclosed arcade corridor to open urban street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered walkway toward the bright exit ahead

entered.detail: industrial metal truss structure forming a roof over the pedestrian path
large vertical digital screen displaying a female character with purple hair
tall building with yellow and orange paneling and vertical windows
low metal barrier separating walkway from street level

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a shadowed covered walkway with industrial metal trusses overhead. The player walks forward toward a bright exit, passing a large digital billboard on the left. The lighting transitions from shadow to bright sunlight as the scene opens up to the street ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic commercial street with neon signage

events.description: approaching intersection with red neon 'Calafornia' sign visible ahead
crossing the red-paved crosswalk at the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking across the red-paved crosswalk toward the commercial intersection ahead

entered.detail: red neon sign with futuristic spelling spanning the street ahead
tall palm trees lining the sidewalk in the distance
distinctive red colored pavement marking the pedestrian crossing
multi-story green parking structure visible down the side street

segments.scene_description: Now in open sunlight, the player walks along a futuristic commercial street toward an intersection marked by a red 'Calafornia' neon sign. The ground transitions to a distinctive red crosswalk as the player crosses the street, with palm trees and a green parking structure visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with green parking structure and food kiosk

events.description: turning right into the open plaza area with green building
encountering group of people sitting and standing in the plaza near kiosk

agents.ego_description: turning right into the plaza and walking past people sitting on the ground near a barricade

notable_agents.action: person sitting on the ground leaning against a yellow and black barricade

entered.detail: wide open concrete plaza space with scattered pedestrians
small commercial stall with blue and orange signage
multiple large advertising screens on building facade showing various images

segments.scene_description: The player turns right into an open plaza dominated by a green parking structure. Several people are scattered throughout the plaza, with some sitting on the ground near a barricade. A food kiosk and large digital screens are visible as the player explores the area.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy downtown street with holographic advertisements and traffic

events.description: turning left back onto the main street sidewalk
red and white compact car drives past from left to right across intersection
brown sedan drives past from left to right followed by other vehicles

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk passing pedestrians and observing the passing traffic and holographic billboards

notable_agents.action: red and white compact car driving across the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: large vertical digital billboard displaying a muscular shirtless man with 'BOTTOMS UP' text
building facade with distinctive yellow and black geometric pattern
elevated walkway bridge connecting buildings across the street
tall glass and steel tower visible in the distance between buildings

segments.scene_description: Turning back onto the main street, the player walks along a busy downtown sidewalk lined with towering buildings. A prominent holographic billboard of a boxer dominates the right side. Vehicles including a red and white compact car and a brown sedan drive past on the street, while pedestrians walk along the sidewalk under the shadow of an overhead pedestrian bridge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a shadowed industrial corridor into the vibrant, sun-drenched expanse of a futuristic downtown. It begins within a covered walkway beneath metal trusses, moving past a digital billboard as the lighting shifts abruptly from deep shadow to bright sunlight upon exiting. As the camera advances onto a commercial street, it crosses a red crosswalk beneath a neon Calafornia sign, passing palm trees and a green parking structure. The scene then opens into a wide plaza where the camera explores around a food kiosk and scattered pedestrians before turning back toward the main thoroughfare. Finally, the movement continues along a busy sidewalk lined with towering buildings and a massive holographic boxer, passing flowing traffic and pedestrians beneath the shadow of an overhead bridge.
